channel.title: community on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in community on Tech Tracker

item.title: blabla - A live community platform to host audio voice streamings.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-wQ6bbh5Y91U/Yem1VnCqjCI/AAAAAAAAIp8/oCsRo_NiHEMlWM-Bf_wzm-kmBieGngSYACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1642706258352688-0.png" alt=""> People shifted from voice messages to instant messaging chatting apps to save time and get faster response, how ever it is un-deniable fact alot of people still like to send audio messages, this is why every instant messaging app like whatsapp and telegram etc include voice record options for such users but the problem with most instant messaging apps is they don’t give you complete audio messaging feel and experience as chatting features can be seen every corner on app and website.

item.title: What Is Rooting ?
item.description: **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-ZgdvFsAfsB0/Xh367vVxG1I/AAAAAAAAAyU/j7TW1gE7Vx4bOHnzr0jYZFmnCKajksx7ACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1579023076867607-0.png" alt=""> ** Hi, What is Rooting ? Do you ever hear this word ? More probably, yes rooting is the one of the most popular and discussed technology thing in android community. Lets, know what is rooting, rooting is nothing but it gives system level access in android to get usercan do whatever he want to do. In the device.Like, modifying anything in software, tweak kernels and installing different softwares, install things and modify according to you liking.
